Planetwood Loading Storyboard

Flow Diagram

%%{init: {'theme': 'base', 'themeVariables': { 'primaryColor': '#4e8c6d', 'secondaryColor': '#283436', 'tertiaryColor': '#fff' }}}%% flowchart TD A[Phase 0: Pre-Load] --> B[Phase 1: App Bootstrap] B --> C[Phase 2: Asset Discovery] C --> D[Phase 3: Critical Assets] D --> E[Phase 4: Scene Processing] E --> F[Phase 5: Ready] D --> G[E1: Network Failure] G --> H[Retry] H --> C G --> I[Offline Mode Button] D --> J[E2: glTF Parse Error] J --> K[Refresh Page] J --> L[Report Issue] D --> M[E3: Animation Data Mismatch] M --> N[Continue with fallback] D --> O[E4: WebGL Context Lost] O --> P[Auto-reload in 3s] F --> Q[E5: Single-Player Fallback (Multiplayer Failed)] Q --> R[Toast: Multiplayer Unavailable] Q --> S[Background Retry every 30s] S --> T[On Reconnect: Toast Multiplayer restored]

Timeline Scrubber

Logo

Initializing...

State Gallery

Phase 0: Pre-Load

Logo

Timing: 0-100ms

Trigger: User opens index.html

UI: Minimal HTML shell loads instantly, Planetwood logo centered on dark background.




  
  
  Planetwood

Phase 1: App Bootstrap

Logo

Initializing engine...

Timing: 100-500ms

Trigger: Vite entry point (src/main.js) executes

UI: Logo scales down slightly, moves to top-center. Progress bar appears (0% → 15%). Status: "Initializing engine..."

// src/main.js - simplified
import { initEngine } from './engine.js';
import { LoadingScreen } from './components/LoadingScreen.js';

async function main() {
  LoadingScreen.show();
  LoadingScreen.setStatus('Initializing engine...');
  
  // Initialize Three.js and core modules
  await initEngine();
  
  LoadingScreen.setProgress(0.15); // 15%
}

main().catch(console.error);

Phase 2: Asset Discovery

Logo

Discovering world assets...

47 assets queued

Timing: 500ms-1.5s

Trigger: SceneSystem.js starts loading manifest

UI: Progress: 15% → 30%. Status: "Discovering world assets...". Subtle particle animation around logo (CSS-only, reduced-motion safe). Shows asset count: "47 assets queued"

// SceneSystem.js - simplified
async function loadManifest() {
  LoadingScreen.setStatus('Discovering world assets...');
  
  const manifest = await fetch('/manifest.json').then(r => r.json());
  const assetCount = Object.keys(manifest).length;
  
  LoadingScreen.setSubProgress(0.2); // 20% of this phase
  // Update asset count display in UI
  document.getElementById('asset-count').textContent = `${assetCount} assets queued`;
  
  return manifest;
}

Phase 3: Critical Assets

Logo

Loading animations...

Timing: 1.5s-3.5s

Trigger: glTF scene + decoded_animations.json start loading

UI: Progress: 30% → 70%. Status cycles every 800ms: "Loading terrain...", "Loading animations...", "Loading textures...". Progress bar shows two layers: primary (overall) and secondary (current file). Cancel button appears.

// LoadingScreen.js - setProgress with subProgress
export class LoadingScreen {
  static setProgress(progress) {
    this.progress = Math.min(1, Math.max(0, progress));
    this.updateUI();
  }
  
  static setSubProgress(subProgress) {
    this.subProgress = subProgress;
    this.updateUI();
  }
  
  static updateUI() {
    const progressBar = document.getElementById('main-progress-bar');
    const subProgressBar = document.getElementById('sub-progress-bar');
    
    if (progressBar) {
      progressBar.style.width = `${this.progress * 100}%`;
    }
    
    if (subProgressBar) {
      // Position sub-progress bar within the main progress bar's filled area
      subProgressBar.style.width = `${this.subProgress * 100}%`;
      subProgressBar.style.left = `${this.progress * 100}%`;
    }
  }
}

// Usage in asset loading
LoadingScreen.setProgress(0.3); // 30% overall
LoadingScreen.setSubProgress(0.5); // 50% of current file

Phase 4: Scene Processing

Logo

Building world...

✓ Parsing glTF
✓ Building bone hierarchies
✓ Creating animation clips
⏳ Spawning NPCs...

Timing: 3.5s-4.5s

Trigger: Assets loaded, Three.js parsing + AnimationSystem init

UI: Progress: 70% → 90%. Status: "Building world...". Logo pulses gently. Shows processing steps with checkmarks.

// AnimationSystem.js - simplified
export class AnimationSystem {
  constructor() {
    this.clips = [];
    this.boneHierarchies = [];
  }
  
  async init() {
    // Parse GLTF
    await this.parseGLTF();
    LoadingScreen.setStatus('Building world...');
    LoadingScreen.setProgress(0.75); // 75%
    
    // Build bone hierarchies
    await this.buildBoneHierarchies();
    LoadingScreen.setProgress(0.80); // 80%
    
    // Create animation clips
    await this.createAnimationClips();
    LoadingScreen.setProgress(0.85); // 85%
    
    // Spawn NPCs
    await this.spawnNPCs();
    LoadingScreen.setProgress(0.90); // 90%
  }
}

Phase 5: Ready

Welcome to Planetwood!

HUD fading in...

Timing: 4.5s-5s

Trigger: First render frame complete

UI: Progress: 90% → 100% (smooth ease-out). Status: "Welcome to Planetwood!". Logo + progress bar fade out (300ms). HUD fades in (top-center, 400ms delay). Nameplates appear (staggered 100ms each). World becomes interactive.

// Main render loop - simplified
function animate() {
  requestAnimationFrame(animate);
  
  // Update and render scene
  renderer.render(scene, camera);
  
  // On first frame, trigger UI transitions
  if (!firstFrameRendered) {
    firstFrameRendered = true;
    triggerReadyUI();
  }
}

function triggerReadyUI() {
  // Fade out loading screen
  LoadingScreen.hide();
  
  // Fade in HUD after delay
  setTimeout(() => {
    HUD.fadeIn();
  }, 400);
  
  // Show nameplates with stagger
  const nameplates = document.querySelectorAll('.nameplate');
  nameplates.forEach((np, index) => {
    setTimeout(() => {
      np.style.opacity = '1';
      np.style.transform = 'translateY(0)';
    }, index * 100);
  });
}

E1: Network Failure

Logo

Connection lost. Retrying...

Trigger: Any critical asset fails to load (timeout > 15s or HTTP error)

UI: Progress bar turns --error-red. Status: "Connection lost. Retrying...". Retry button (primary action). Offline mode button (secondary). Auto-retry every 5s (max 3 attempts).

// LoadingScreen.js - error handling
export class LoadingScreen {
  static showError({ message, retry, retryable = true }) {
    this.hide();
    
    const errorOverlay = document.createElement('div');
    errorOverlay.className = 'error-overlay';
    errorOverlay.innerHTML = `
      

        
${message}

        ${retry ? '' : ''}
        
      

    `;
    
    document.body.appendChild(errorOverlay);
    
    if (retry) {
      errorOverlay.querySelector('.retry-btn').addEventListener('click', () => {
        this.hideError();
        this.retryLoading();
      });
    }
    
    errorOverlay.querySelector('.offline-btn').addEventListener('click', () => {
      this.hideError();
      this.triggerOfflineMode();
    });
  }
  
  static retryLoading() {
    // Implement retry logic with exponential backoff
    // Max 3 attempts, every 5s
  }
}

E2: glTF Parse Error

World Data Corrupted

The planet data couldn't be read. Please refresh or contact support.

Trigger: scene.gltf or scene.bin corrupted/invalid

UI: Modal overlay with --error-red accent. Title: "World Data Corrupted". Message: "The planet data couldn't be read. Please refresh or contact support." Buttons: "Refresh Page" | "Report Issue"

// Error handling in asset loading
try {
  const gltf = await loader.loadAsync('/scene.gltf');
  scene.add(gltf.scene);
} catch (error) {
  console.error('GLTF loading failed:', error);
  LoadingScreen.showError({
    message: 'World data corrupted. Please refresh or contact support.',
    retry: true
  });
}

// ErrorScreen component integration
function onError(error) {
  ErrorScreen.show({
    title: 'World Data Corrupted',
    message: 'The planet data couldn\'t be read. Please refresh or contact support.',
    buttons: [
      { text: 'Refresh Page', action: () => window.location.reload() },
      { text: 'Report Issue', action: () => openSupportTicket() }
    ]
  });
}

E3: Animation Data Mismatch

Logo

Animation data outdated — using fallback idle

Trigger: decoded_animations.json schema version mismatch or bone count mismatch

UI: Inline warning in loading screen (not modal). Status: "Animation data outdated — using fallback idle". Continues loading with reduced NPC animations. Logs detailed diff to console (dev only).

// AnimationSystem.js - handling mismatch
async function loadAnimationData() {
  try {
    const data = await fetch('/decoded_animations.json').then(r => r.json());
    
    // Validate schema version
    if (data.schemaVersion !== EXPECTED_SCHEMA_VERSION) {
      throw new Error(`Schema mismatch: expected ${EXPECTED_SCHEMA_VERSION}, got ${data.schemaVersion}`);
    }
    
    // Validate bone count
    if (data.boneCount !== skeleton.bones.length) {
      throw new Error(`Bone count mismatch: expected ${skeleton.bones.length}, got ${data.boneCount}`);
    }
    
    this.clips = data.clips;
  } catch (error) {
    console.warn('Animation data mismatch:', error);
    
    // Show non-blocking warning
    LoadingScreen.setStatus('Animation data outdated — using fallback idle', 'warning-amber');
    
    // Fallback to idle animations only
    this.clips = [createFallbackIdleClip()];
  }
}

E4: WebGL Context Lost

Graphics Device Reset

Your graphics driver reset. Reloading in 3s...

Trigger: webglcontextlost event during load

UI: Full-screen overlay: "Graphics Device Reset". Message: "Your graphics driver reset. Reloading in 3s...". Auto-reload after 3s (or manual button). Preserves no state (fresh load).

// main.js - handling webglcontextlost
renderer.domElement.addEventListener('webglcontextlost', (event) => {
  event.preventDefault();
  
  const overlay = document.createElement('div');
  overlay.className = 'webgl-lost-overlay';
  overlay.innerHTML = `
    

      
Graphics Device Reset

      
Your graphics driver reset. Reloading in 3s...

      
    

  `;
  
  document.body.appendChild(overlay);
  
  let countdown = 3;
  const countdownEl = document.getElementById('countdown');
  const interval = setInterval(() => {
    countdown--;
    countdownEl.textContent = countdown;
    
    if (countdown <= 0) {
      clearInterval(interval);
      window.location.reload();
    }
  }, 1000);
  
  document.getElementById('reload-btn').addEventListener('click', () => {
    clearInterval(interval);
    window.location.reload();
  });
}, false);

E5: Single-Player Fallback

Logo

Welcome to Planetwood!

Multiplayer Unavailable
Exploring alone today. Retry in background...

Trigger: WebSocket relay connection fails after 5s timeout (T016)

UI: Non-blocking — loading continues to Phase 5. Toast: "Multiplayer Unavailable". HUD connection indicator shows --warning-amber (fair). Background retry every 30s. On reconnect: toast "Multiplayer restored!" + HUD turns --success-green.

// NetworkManager.js - handling multiplayer fallback
export class NetworkManager {
  constructor() {
    this.ws = null;
    this.reconnectInterval = null;
    this.isConnected = false;
  }
  
  async connect() {
    try {
      this.ws = new WebSocket('ws://localhost:3001');
      
      this.ws.onopen = () => {
        this.isConnected = true;
        this.updateHUDConnection('good');
        this.showToast('Multiplayer restored!', 'success-green');
        clearInterval(this.reconnectInterval);
      };
      
      this.ws.onclose = () => {
        this.isConnected = false;
        this.updateHUDConnection('poor');
        this.showToast('Multiplayer disconnected', 'warning-amber');
        this.scheduleReconnect();
      };
      
      this.ws.onerror = () => {
        this.ws.close(); // Trigger onclose
      };
    } catch (error) {
      this.handleConnectionError();
    }
  }
  
  handleConnectionError() {
    this.isConnected = false;
    this.updateHUDConnection('poor');
    this.showToast('Multiplayer Unavailable', 'warning-amber', 8000);
    this.scheduleReconnect();
  }
  
  scheduleReconnect() {
    if (!this.reconnectInterval) {
      this.reconnectInterval = setInterval(() => {
        this.connect();
      }, 30000); // 30 seconds
    }
  }
  
  updateHUDConnection(quality) {
    // 'good' | 'fair' | 'poor'
    const colorMap = {
      good: 'var(--success-green)',
      fair: 'var(--warning-amber)',
      poor: 'var(--error-red)'
    };
    HUD.setConnectionQuality(quality);
    document.getElementById('connection-indicator').style.backgroundColor = colorMap[quality];
  }
  
  showToast(message, type, duration = 5000) {
    // Implementation using Notifications API
    window.Notifications.notify({
      type: type.includes('success') ? 'achievement' : 'warning',
      title: message.split(' ')[0],
      message: message.split(' ').slice(1).join(' '),
      duration: duration
    });
  }
}

// Usage in main.js
const networkManager = new NetworkManager();
networkManager.connect();

// Connection fails after 5s timeout triggers handleConnectionError

Asset Loading Waterfall (Mock)

decoded_animations.json (21MB)
Downloaded
Pending

Downloaded
textures/

Pending

Downloaded

Critical path highlighted: decoded_animations.json (21MB) is the longest serial dependency.

Copy-Paste Code Blocks

index.html critical CSS + shell




  
  
  Planetwood
  
  


  

    
    

      

      

    

    
Initializing...

src/main.js loading orchestration

import { initEngine } from './engine.js';
import { LoadingScreen } from './components/LoadingScreen.js';
import { HUD } from './components/HUD.js';
import { Notifications } from './components/Notifications.js';
import { NetworkManager } from './network/NetworkManager.js';

let firstFrameRendered = false;

async function main() {
  try {
    // Show loading screen immediately
    LoadingScreen.show();
    LoadingScreen.setStatus('Initializing engine...');
    
    // Initialize Three.js and core modules
    await initEngine();
    
    // Start asset loading sequence
    await loadAssets();
    
    // Initialize game systems
    await initGameSystems();
    
    // Start render loop
    await startRenderLoop();
    
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Failed to initialize game:', error);
    LoadingScreen.showError({
      message: 'Failed to initialize game. Please refresh and try again.',
      retry: true
    });
  }
}

async function loadAssets() {
  // Phase 2: Asset Discovery
  LoadingScreen.setStatus('Discovering world assets...');
  const manifest = await fetchManifest();
  
  // Update asset count in UI
  document.getElementById('asset-count').textContent = `${Object.keys(manifest).length} assets queued`;
  
  // Phase 3: Critical Assets Loading
  LoadingScreen.setStatus('Loading terrain...');
  await loadSceneGLTF();
  
  LoadingScreen.setStatus('Loading animations...');
  await loadAnimations();
  
  LoadingScreen.setStatus('Loading textures...');
  await loadTextures();
  
  // Phase 4: Scene Processing
  LoadingScreen.setStatus('Building world...');
  await processScene();
  
  // Final progress
  LoadingScreen.setProgress(1.0);
  LoadingScreen.setStatus('Welcome to Planetwood!');
}

async function fetchManifest() {
  const response = await fetch('/manifest.json');
  if (!response.ok) throw new Error('Failed to load manifest');
  return response.json();
}

async function loadSceneGLTF() {
  // Simulate loading with progress updates
  const totalTime = 2000; // 2 seconds for this asset
  const startTime = performance.now();
  
  while (performance.now() - startTime < totalTime) {
    const progress = (performance.now() - startTime) / totalTime;
    LoadingScreen.setProgress(0.3 + (progress * 0.2)); // 30% to 50% range
    await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 16)); // ~60fps
  }
  
  // Actually load the GLTF model
  // const gltf = await loader.loadAsync('/scene.gltf');
  // scene.add(gltf.scene);
}

async function loadAnimations() {
  // Simulate loading the large animation file
  const totalTime = 8000; // 8 seconds for 21MB file
  const startTime = performance.now();
  
  while (performance.now() - startTime < totalTime) {
    const progress = (performance.now() - startTime) / totalTime;
    LoadingScreen.setProgress(0.5 + (progress * 0.2)); // 50% to 70% range
    LoadingScreen.setSubProgress(progress); // Show sub-progress for current file
    await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 16));
  }
  
  // Actually load animations
  // const animations = await loader.loadAsync('/decoded_animations.json');
}

async function loadTextures() {
  // Simulate texture loading
  const totalTime = 3000; // 3 seconds
  const startTime = performance.now();
  
  while (performance.now() - startTime < totalTime) {
    const progress = (performance.now() - startTime) / totalTime;
    LoadingScreen.setProgress(0.7 + (progress * 0.2)); // 70% to 90% range
    await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 16));
  }
  
  // Actually load textures
  // const textures = await Promise.all(textureUrls.map(url => loader.loadAsync(url)));
}

async function processScene() {
  // Simulate scene processing
  await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 1000)); // 1 second
  LoadingScreen.setProgress(0.9);
  LoadingScreen.setStatus('Building world...');
  
  // Actually process scene: build bone hierarchies, create animation clips, spawn NPCs
  // await buildBoneHierarchies();
  // await createAnimationClips();
  // await spawnNPCs();
}

async function startRenderLoop() {
  // Hide loading screen and show game
  LoadingScreen.hide();
  
  // Fade in HUD
  setTimeout(() => {
    HUD.fadeIn();
  }, 400);
  
  // Show nameplates with stagger
  const nameplates = document.querySelectorAll('.nameplate');
  nameplates.forEach((np, index) => {
    setTimeout(() => {
      np.style.opacity = '1';
      np.style.transform = 'translateY(0)';
    }, index * 100);
  });
  
  // Start render loop
  function animate() {
    requestAnimationFrame(animate);
    
    // Update and render scene
    if (mixer) mixer.update(clock.getDelta());
    renderer.render(scene, camera);
    
    // Update HUD
    HUD.update();
  }
  
  requestAnimationFrame(animate);
}

// Handle network failures and fallback
const networkManager = new NetworkManager();
networkManager.connect();

// Start the application
main().catch(console.error);

Error handling wrapper

// LoadingScreen.js - enhanced with error states
export class LoadingScreen {
  static #instance;
  static #overlay;
  static #progressBar;
  static #subProgressBar;
  static #statusText;
  static #retryCallback;
  static #offlineCallback;
  
  static init() {
    if (this.#instance) return this.#instance;
    
    this.#overlay = document.createElement('div');
    this.#overlay.id = 'loading-overlay';
    this.#overlay.innerHTML = `
      

        

          
        

        

          

          

        

        
Initializing...

        

      

    `;
    
    document.body.appendChild(this.#overlay);
    
    this.#progressBar = this.#overlay.querySelector('#main-progress-bar');
    this.#subProgressBar = this.#overlay.querySelector('#sub-progress-bar');
    this.#statusText = this.#overlay.querySelector('#status-text');
    
    return this.#instance = this;
  }
  
  static show() {
    this.init();
    this.#overlay.style.display = 'flex';
    this.#overlay.setAttribute('aria-busy', 'true');
  }
  
  static hide() {
    if (this.#overlay) {
      this.#overlay.style.display = 'none';
      this.#overlay.removeAttribute('aria-busy');
    }
  }
  
  static setProgress(progress) {
    this.init();
    const clamped = Math.min(1, Math.max(0, progress));
    this.#progressBar.style.width = `${clamped * 100}%`;
  }
  
  static setSubProgress(subProgress) {
    this.init();
    const clamped = Math.min(1, Math.max(0, subProgress));
    this.#subProgressBar.style.width = `${clamped * 100}%`;
  }
  
  static setStatus(message, type = 'default') {
    this.init();
    this.#statusText.textContent = message;
    
    // Set ARIA live region for screen readers
    this.#statusText.setAttribute('aria-live', 'polite');
    
    // Apply status-based coloring
    switch (type) {
      case 'error':
        this.#statusText.style.color = 'var(--error-red)';
        break;
      case 'warning':
        this.#statusText.style.color = 'var(--warning-amber)';
        break;
      case 'success':
        this.#statusText.style.color = 'var(--success-green)';
        break;
      case 'info':
        this.#statusText.style.color = 'var(--info-blue)';
        break;
      default:
        this.#statusText.style.color = 'var(--white-text)';
    }
  }
  
  static showError({ message, retry, retryable = true }) {
    this.hide();
    
    const errorOverlay = document.createElement('div');
    errorOverlay.className = 'error-overlay';
    errorOverlay.innerHTML = `
      

        
Error

        
${message}

        

          ${retry ? '' : ''}
          
        

      

    `;
    
    document.body.appendChild(errorOverlay);
    
    if (retry) {
      errorOverlay.querySelector('.retry-btn').addEventListener('click', () => {
        this.hideError();
        if (this.#retryCallback) this.#retryCallback();
      });
    }
    
    errorOverlay.querySelector('.offline-btn').addEventListener('click', () => {
      this.hideError();
      if (this.#offlineCallback) this.#offlineCallback();
    });
  }
  
  static hideError() {
    const errorOverlay = document.querySelector('.error-overlay');
    if (errorOverlay) {
      errorOverlay.remove();
    }
  }
  
  static showOfflineButton() {
    this.init();
    const buttonContainer = this.#overlay.querySelector('#button-container');
    buttonContainer.innerHTML = '';
    buttonContainer.querySelector('.offline-btn').addEventListener('click', () => {
      if (this.#offlineCallback) this.#offlineCallback();
    });
  }
  
  static setRetryCallback(callback) {
    this.#retryCallback = callback;
  }
  
  static setOfflineCallback(callback) {
    this.#offlineCallback = callback;
  }
}

// Usage in main.js
LoadingScreen.setRetryCallback(() => {
  // Retry loading logic
  loadAssets().catch(console.error);
});

LoadingScreen.setOfflineCallback(() => {
  // Switch to offline/single-player mode
  initializeOfflineMode();
});
